front.title: Signaling MSD (Maximum SID Depth) using OSPF

abstract.t: This document defines a way for an OSPF Router to advertise multiple types of supported Maximum SID Depths (MSDs) at node and/or link granularity. Such advertisements allow entities (e.g., centralized controllers) to determine whether a particular SID stack can be supported in a given network. This document only defines one type of MSD maximum label imposition, but defines an encoding which can support other MSD types. Here the term OSPF means both OSPFv2 and OSPFv3.
